rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GAETANO (THOMAS) IVELI REVOCABLE TRUST, DATED 12/9/02
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement Regarding January 12, 2026 Trial Matter
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/10/26. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The petition e-filed on 1/16/26 was incomplete. A "Notice of Errata" e-filed on 2/4/26 submitted a copy of the settlement agreement missing from the petition, but notice served by the other parties to the settlement agreement, not the petitioner, showed that notice of the petition and "Errata" was mailed on 4/15/26. Trusts require 30 days' notice. (2) Proof of service of notice of the 6/10/26 of the petition and "Errata" must be filed, showing that at least 30 days' notice was given. Deadline is 5/27/26 for providing the assigned examiner a courtesy copy of the proof of service. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGARET L. CORTEZ REVOCABLE TRUST ESTBLISHED JUNE 17, 2002, AND AS AMENDED ON OCTOBER 3, 2008
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (815 Central Avenue, Pittsburg, Ca 94565)
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. Proof of publication that the real property is located at 850 Central Ave, not 815 Central Ave. 2. 90% of the re-appraised value is $369,000, but the property is being sold for $338,000. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RONALDO ORDONEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/9/26. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) When an accounting is presented, original bank or brokerage statements must be filed to verify the ending balance(s) shown in the accounting. None appears to have been filed. [LRSF 14.34 D.] See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (2) This Court does not ordinarily review a first accounting exceeding two years; however, in light of the fact that there was only one piece of real property, the accounting was reviewed. Disbursements show costs in connection with a piano. No tangible personal property was inventoried. (3) The final seller's statement shows another payment of $10,768.00, but this is not reflected in the accounting. (4) The mandatory Judicial Council form DE-300 is required to be part of the 13100 affidavit. (The original has not yet been reviewed by the examiner to see if a certified copy of the death certificate was attached.) Please provide courtesy copies of all papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 5/26/26. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (A Court-appointed fiduciary is required to sign and verify her own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment thereto, and a "declaration" should be prepared on pleading paper, not the Judicial Council form.)
